root_cause: Policy engine unavailable during admission evaluation
evidence: Admission failure references Gatekeeper or Kyverno webhook
Webhook failure mode indicates infrastructure unavailability

causes.message: Gatekeeper or Kyverno admission enforcement is configured
Policy engine webhook infrastructure is unavailable
Admission cannot complete required policy evaluation
Pod creation is blocked because policy engine checks cannot run

pod:gatekeeper-blocked-pod: Policy engine webhook unavailable during admission

likely_causes: Gatekeeper or Kyverno webhook service has no healthy endpoints
Policy engine DNS or network connectivity is failing
Webhook TLS configuration is invalid or expired
suggested_checks: Check Gatekeeper or Kyverno controller/webhook pods
Inspect webhook service endpoints and TLS configuration
